sections_cited: section 111 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 251 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.1, 4 & 27. 2. For orders on CMA No.1988/2024. 3. For orders on CMA No.1989/2024. 4. For orders on CMA No.1990/2024. 5. For hearing of main case. 20.10.2025 Mr. Qaim Ali Memon, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Muhammad Ramzan Awan, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of the respondent, same is taken on record. It is demonstrated from the impugned judgment that the basic question before the court is pertaining to section 111 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. It is jointly submitted that the question is squarely covered against department and in favour of the respondent pursuant to the judgment passed in the case of Commissioner Inland Revenue Lahore vs. Millat Tractors Limited, Lahore and others reported as 2024 SCMR 700. In view hereof, learned counsel for the applicant does not press this reference application, which is hereby dismissed as withdrawn. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
